action_descriptions.retry_with_better_evidence: Rerun candidate against a different, stronger evidence packet.
action_descriptions.safe_verifier_tuning_candidate: Inspect whether a general verifier/table rule can safely reduce review.
action_descriptions.evidence_packet_repair_candidate: Repair evidence attachment first; current suggestion is not strong enough to rerun.
action_descriptions.needs_second_source_consensus: Find independent text/table consensus before promotion.
action_descriptions.semantic_duplicate_review: Compare a high-similarity review item against an already verified rule; usually a duplicate/degraded extraction.
action_descriptions.semantic_guardrail_review: Close semantic match, but core guardrails disagree; inspect manually instead of tuning.
action_descriptions.human_legal_review: Resolve exception or cross-family conflict manually.
action_descriptions.defer_low_priority: Leave in review until broader benchmark evidence exists.

recommendations: Keep 1 close semantic matches blocked until their guardrail mismatch is resolved.
